column1: Table S10.  Output summary statistics for all eSNPs identified after five rounds of conditional eQTL analysis. Conditional eQTL results. Columns are: Cell type: Tested cell type, Gene ID: Tested gene symbol, Gene Ensembl ID: Tested gene Ensembl ID, SNP: Tested SNP rsID, Chromosome: Chromosome of tested SNP, Position: Position of tested SNP on chromosome, SNP assessed allele: assessed allele in the eQTL analysis, eSNP rank: round of conditional analysis the SNP was identified as an independent eQTL, rho correlation coefficient: Spearman's rank correlation coefficient, S-statistics: Statistics of Spearman’s rank correlation test, p-value: p-value of the eQTL association, q-value: q-value of the eQTL association, FDR: FDR value of the eQTL association.
